headline: Checking In on Stock Picks Cactus, Netflix, Wabtec
summary: Reviewing former stock picks can be just as important as identifying new opportunities, as it allows investors to evaluate what worked, which signals proved most effective, and whether the original thesis remains intact.  The stock is down 24% since our recommendation.
